scripts.alerts: node tools/deadline-alerts/generate-alerts.mjs --file tools/deadline-alerts/conferences.json --other-file tools/deadline-alerts/other-deadlines.json --out tools/deadline-alerts/alerts && npm run alerts:publish
scripts.alerts:wide: node tools/deadline-alerts/generate-alerts.mjs --file tools/deadline-alerts/conferences.json --other-file tools/deadline-alerts/other-deadlines.json --out tools/deadline-alerts/alerts --days 90 && npm run alerts:publish
